title: Retention and Disposal of Records for Grants, Contracts, and Cooperative Agreements Policy
display_label: Retention and Disposal of Records for Grants, Contracts, and Cooperative Agreements
content: Establishes minimum retention periods and disposal procedures for financial records, supporting documents, statistical records, and other records pertaining to sponsored grants, contracts, and cooperative agreements, consistent with sponsor requirements and federal Uniform Guidance (2 CFR 200). Compiled in PI Handbook 5 (effective 2024-07-01). Full policy details in PI Handbook 5.
